svg.text: Connector T-bar (turned 90°) · lower wall + floor panel + upper wall · looking from interior
B. Plan View (looking down at floor level)
C. Section Across Room (showing floor panel between two walls)
Both wall webs point inward (same orientation) · Connector bolts to outer half of web
edges aligned with wall interior face
floor panel inside web pocket · connector on outer half of webs
lower web, upper web, and connector flange all overlap in the same zone

g.text: All bolts: M12 × 30mm through 14mm of steel (7mm + 7mm). One bolt size, one wrench.
